subcodes.first_line: Hearken! The rustling of the Supreme Pen and the murmuring of the divine Lote-Tree are raised on high. Blessed is the soul that hath attained unto their hearing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح س صریر قلم اعلی و حفیف سدره منتهی مرتفع طوبی از برای نفسیکه باصغا فائز گشت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
